utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Lights . Uh , romantic lights .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ooh , nice .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: So ah , there was this thing I wanted to talk to you about .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , right ! I completely forgot about that .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Well ah , I have been doing a lot of thinking , and I look at my life

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah ?

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: And I feel like I have conquered the business world , and I feel like I have conquered the intellectual world , and now I ... I have the most beautiful woman in the world .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I feel like I have conquered the business world , and I feel like I have conquered the intellectual world , and now I ... I have the most beautiful woman in the world .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wow .

emotion_cause.span: 7_now I ... I have the most beautiful woman in the world .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: There is one thing missing .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What that ?

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: It is time for me to conquer the physical world .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Monica , I want to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You wanna what ? !

emotion_cause.span: 13_I want to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: I want to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion ! It is the most intense physical competition in the world , it is banned in 49 states !

emotion_cause.span: 15_I want to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion ! It is the most intense physical competition in the world , it is banned in 49 states !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What are you talking about ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_I want to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion ! It is the most intense physical competition in the world , it is banned in 49 states !

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Okay , my trainer , Ho Chi , is teaching me a combination of Gee Koon Doe and Brazilian street fighting , I have even had my own octagon training ring designed .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And I suppose you used a ring designer for that .

emotion_cause.span: 18_you used a ring designer for that .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: Monica , I want you there in the front row when I win .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: I want you close enough to smell the blood .

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: What do you think ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: My parents will be so happy .
